scripts.test:integration: npm run test:integration:prepare && vitest run tests/integration
scripts.validate:architecture: npm run test:integration:prepare && vitest run tests/architecture
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
scripts.test:build: npm run build && vitest run tests/build
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm run validate:architecture && npm run test && npm run test:build && npm run test:e2e
